rules.description: Multi-region writes enable high availability but require careful consistency and conflict resolution. Using Bounded Staleness is an anti-pattern, as replication lag increases latency and coordination overhead. This setup undermines scalability, impacting performance and availability.
rules.query: where array_length(properties.locations) > 1 and properties.enableMultipleWriteLocations == false | extend defaultConsistencyLevel = tostring(properties.consistencyPolicy.defaultConsistencyLevel) | where defaultConsistencyLevel !in ('Strong', 'BoundedStaleness')
rules.fix: Multi-region writes enable high availability but require careful consistency and conflict resolution. Using Bounded Staleness is an anti-pattern, as replication lag increases latency and coordination overhead. This setup undermines scalability, impacting performance and availability.

rules.description: All Cosmos DB database accounts must use Transport Layer Security (TLS) 1.2 or higher
